about.title: About Me
about.description: Full Stack Developer with over 3 years of experience, specialized in Vue.js and Node.js. I work on both corporate and autonomous projects, developing complete systems from planning to production deployment. Solid experience with RESTful APIs, relational databases, Docker, Linux servers and CI/CD pipelines.
